Hi, I'm Rohin

I'm a builder and thinker interested in software, design, and the intersection of technology with everyday life. I spend most of my time writing code, reading widely, and exploring ideas that sit at the edges of disciplines.

This site is a home for my writing and projects — a place to think out loud about the things I'm learning and making. I believe in working in public, learning by doing, and the quiet power of showing up consistently.

When I'm not at a keyboard, you'll find me going on walks, cooking something new, or buried in a good book. Feel free to look around.
